query:
UPDATE services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
SET s.planName = 'TW Mobile Plan 5GB (4G Backup) + Overages'
WHERE s.provider = 'Vocus' AND s.serviceType = 'Mobile'
AND c.customerType = 'retail_offering'
AND s.externalId LIKE 'S%'
AND s.monthlyCost = '15.00';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute UPDATE services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
SET s.planName = 'TW Mobile Plan 5GB (4G Backup) + Overages'
WHERE s.provider = 'Vocus' AND s.serviceType = 'Mobile'
AND c.customerType = 'retail_offering'
AND s.externalId LIKE 'S%'
AND s.monthlyCost = '15.00';
